result: The data cleaning and preprocessing task has been completed. The R script successfully loaded the four tab-delimited datasets, merged them by the NSID variable, harmonized the parental employment variables (W1-W4) into a consistent detailed classification (ecoactdtma14-17 and ecoactdtpa14-17) with standardized missing value codes (-9, -8, -1, -3, -2, -7), and applied the required factor labeling. The resulting cleaned dataset, containing only the NSID and the derived parental employment variables, was saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv.
